Values in watt instead of kW: Values in watt instead of kW
Define a custom format like DD.MM.YYYY H: Define a custom format like DD.MM.YYYY HH:mm:ss
pvnode tier help: Free: 1 update/day (24 h interval). Light: hourly updates (60 min interval). Plus: nowcasting every 10 min.
pvnode forecast days help: Number of forecast days (Free: max 2 – today and tomorrow; Light/Plus: max 7)
pvnode forecast days free validator erro: The Free tier only supports 1-2 forecast days (today and tomorrow).
pvnode api v2 help: Enable API v2 (recommended). Plant configuration is managed on the pvnode portal via the Site ID. pvnode v1 will be shut down on 2026-12-31.
pvnode site id help: Site ID from the pvnode portal (e.g. site_xxxx…).
pvnode v2 plant info: In API v2 mode, plant configuration (orientation, tilt, power) is managed on the pvnode portal via the Site ID. Only the name for display and optionally the peak power for the 'Installed power' state are needed here.
